description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Maven Docker image with a cache of the local Maven repository at .m2/repository. Define a single stage called build. Add a build job (stage: build) that runs the command "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS -U package -DskipTests", stores the generated WAR files matching target/*.war as an artifact named $CI_PROJECT_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG, and is limited to tag pipelines (only: tags). Add a quality job (stage: build) that is allowed to fail, runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS -Dsonar.host.url=$SONARQUBE_URL sonar:sonar", archives the entire target directory as an artifact, and runs only on the develop branch when the variable SONARQUBE_URL is defined. Set the variables MAVEN_CLI_OPTS to "--batch-mode --errors --fail-at-end --show-version" and MAVEN_OPTS to the provided JVM options for TLS, repository location, logging, and headless mode.
